title: agalma hoi
intro: Agalma hoi, also known as the "holy herb" or "holy thistle," is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its thistle-like appearance and medicinal properties. Its leaves and flowers are rich in silymarin, a flavonoid that has been shown to possess antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and hepatoprotective properties, making it a potential treatment for liver and gallbladder issues. The health benefits of Agalma hoi include improved liver function, reduced inflammation, and enhanced antioxidant defenses, which may help to mitigate conditions such as cirrhosis, jaundice, and liver cancer. Agalma hoi can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although its traditional use as a medicinal plant has been largely replaced by synthetic liver protectants.
